meta.title: Tursunboev Muhammad — Software Engineer & Frontend Developer
meta.description: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building CRMs, ERPs and e-commerce platforms with React, Next.js and TypeScript. Frontend specialist, full-stack capable.
meta.keywords: Tursunboev Muhammad, Software Engineer, Frontend Developer, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Tashkent, Uzbekistan portfolio
meta.ogAlt: Portfolio of Tursunboev Muhammad — Software Engineer

hero.name: Muhammad
hero.summary: I build fast, accessible and beautifully animated web applications. Over 4+ years I've shipped CRMs, ERPs and e-commerce platforms for real businesses — turning complex problems into clean, reliable products.

about.title: Turning ideas into polished, production-ready products
about.lead: I'm a Software Engineer based in Tashkent with a deep focus on frontend craft and a full-stack mindset.
paragraphs: For 4+ years I've been designing and building web applications — most of my experience is on the frontend with React, Next.js and TypeScript, while I'm equally comfortable shaping APIs with Node.js and NestJS.

I love untangling complex problems and learning hard things. I care about performance, accessibility and the small interaction details that make a product feel alive. I'm also genuinely passionate about gaming and everything happening in tech.
I adapt quickly to new teams, communicate clearly, and ship reliably under deadlines — whether I'm building an entire LMS platform or a focused logistics CRM.

projects.title: Projects I'm proud of
projects.subtitle: A selection of products I've designed and engineered — from real-time logistics to large-scale EdTech.

mentour.description: A large-scale school management platform that digitizes the whole learning workflow: topics and lessons, students, organizations and schools. Built with full RBAC, speaking & writing modules, AI integration and an internal CRM that captures Meta leads. Fully responsive — and I'm actively shipping new features.

lactalis.tagline: Real-time milk-supply tracking for Nestlé / Lactalis
lactalis.description: A focused CRM for Lactalis (Nestlé): tracking how much milk arrives and leaves, who delivered it and which driver, with timestamps and photo proof. Photos stored on AWS S3 and deliveries pinned with geolocation.

goavto.tagline: Buy, sell, rent and test-drive cars
goavto.description: An automotive marketplace covering buying, selling, booking, renting and test-drive flows, with promotional landing pages and interactive 3D car views for an immersive browsing experience.

oxygen.tagline: Selling homes online with immersive 3D tours
oxygen.description: An online property sales platform showing how many homes exist, sold and remaining, where each property is located, with immersive 3D views powered by Three.js for a true sense of space.

navbatda.description: A digital queue system that numbers and manages queues and lets people book their spot online in real time over Socket.IO — removing the wait and the chaos.

experience.title: Where I've grown
experience.subtitle: Five companies, one direction — building better software every year.

tune.description: Building and scaling production web applications inside a product engineering team, focused on performant, maintainable frontend architecture.

algoritm.description: Mentored aspiring developers in modern frontend (React, TypeScript) — reviewing code and guiding them through real-world projects.

technova.description: Delivered full-stack features across the Node.js / React stack — from API design to polished, responsive UIs.

realsoft.description: Developed and maintained CRM and e-commerce interfaces, shipping responsive, accessible UI with React.

nisd.description: Started my professional journey building web interfaces and turning designs into clean, functional React components.

contact.title: Let's build something great together
